title: Version & Backend
description: Current DFlash MLX server version. Updated with each app release.

title: DFlash Draft
description: Enable DFlash speculative decoding. The matching draft model from the [z-lab/dflash](https://huggingface.co/collections/z-lab/dflash) collection is auto-downloaded for the currently running MLX model.

title: DFlash Block Size
description: Block size for DFlash speculative decoding. Default 16; raise for larger drafts at the cost of latency.

title: MTP Speculative Decoding (Gemma 4 · Qwen · DeepSeek V4)
description: Enable Multi-Token Prediction speculative decoding. Covers three drafter families, with the matching head auto-downloaded for the currently running MLX model: Gemma 4 (`mlx-community/gemma-4-*-it-assistant-bf16`), Qwen 3.5/3.6 (`mlx-community/Qwen3.*-MTP-bf16`) and DeepSeek V4 Flash (`mlx-community/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-MTP-bf16`). Mutually exclusive with DFlash and EAGLE-3.

title: MTP Block Size
description: Number of speculatively drafted tokens per round for the MTP drafter (Gemma 4, Qwen 3.5/3.6 or DeepSeek V4). Default 4 (matches the Gemma 4 README perf table); raise for larger drafts at the cost of latency.

title: EAGLE-3 Speculative Decoding (Gemma 4)
description: Enable EAGLE-3 speculative decoding for Gemma 4 targets. The matching `RedHatAI/*-speculator.eagle3` drafter is auto-downloaded for the currently running MLX model. Mutually exclusive with DFlash and MTP.

title: EAGLE-3 Block Size
description: Override the number of speculatively drafted tokens per round for the EAGLE-3 speculator. 0 (default) uses the speculator's own configured depth; raise for larger drafts at the cost of latency.

title: KV Cache Quantization
description: Quantize the KV cache to shrink memory and fit longer contexts. `Off` keeps the full-precision cache. `TurboQuant` (WHT-rotated low-bit, pair with ~3.5 bits) gives the best quality-per-byte; `Uniform` is plain group quantization (pair with 4 or 8 bits). Applies on the next model load.

title: KV Cache Bits
description: Bit-width for KV cache quantization when a scheme is selected above. 3.5 is the recommended TurboQuant default; 4 or 8 suit Uniform. Ignored when KV Cache Quantization is Off.
